Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I study tonight before going to bed...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still study...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The desk is neatly organized.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's time to go to school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]may not get any higher...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have plans tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the time until then studying...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a very important task tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the time until then studying...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I study until nighttime...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Internet connection seems to be back up.[n]Now I can play the game Junpei gave me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}※UNUSED ※[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}（Ｖ）コミュ ランク『（Ｖ）』[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}※UNUSED※[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}まだ、何かの力が隠れているようだ…[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}※UNUSED※[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}このアルカナ属性のペルソナは[n]全て解禁している…[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if we can grow closer thanks to the[n]{f 2 4 2} Persona, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The chat box is blinking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Maya wants to play[n]Innocent Sin Online with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya might be online at this hour...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I'll spend the day playing online.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Internet connection seems to be back up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now I can play the game Junpei gave me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The chat box is blinking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Maya wants to play[n]Innocent Sin Online with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya might be online at this hour...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I'll spend the day playing online.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GOTO_CLOSET_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The desk is clean and organized. I should[n]be able to focus while studying here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better put my stuff away[n]in the closet for now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GOTO_BED_0406
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably rest on the bed[n]instead of sitting in the chair...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GOTO_BED_0407
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the desk provided by the dorm. I should[n]try to keep things tidy when I use it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GOTO_BED_0417
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The desk is organized, but I should[n]go to sleep early today just in case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to {f 2 4 0} soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's the Promised Day...[n]I should head to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have plans tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time at my desk until then...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a very important task tonight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time at my desk until then...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time at[n]my desk until nighttime...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not feeling well... I should[n]probably lie down and rest...[n]{f 1 1}
